mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC stays below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20d forward returns in rate-cut periods do not exceed baseline by at least 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly jump in the unemployment rate triggers recession fears and risk-off positioning, depressing S&P 500 prices over the following week.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.4 percentage points within a single month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >65% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 50% over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in revolving consumer credit and housing starts signals robust aggregate demand, driving earnings revisions upward and lifting equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive 20d returns in at least 60% of co-occurring high-credit/high-housing instances, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p>0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and healthy supply-side dynamics, supporting corporate profit margins and equity valuations over a quarterly horizon, particularly when supply constraints ease.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns turn negative when INDPRO expands for three consecutive months, or the signal's predictive power vanishes during periods of supply-chain disruption.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden drop in total nonfarm payrolls indicates rapid labor market deterioration, prompting immediate repricing of equity risk premiums and depressing S&P 500 returns over the following month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines by >200 thousand over a single month
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in more than 55% of instances following a payroll drop exceeding 200k, or the signal's information ratio falls below 0.1 over a 10-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP expands the corporate earnings base, systematically lifting equity valuations over a three-month forward window.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are not significantly higher than the historical median when GDPC1 grows for two consecutive quarters, or the rolling Spearman correlation drops below 0.05 over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the unemployment rate and federal funds rate indicate a soft-landing environment where growth persists without inflationary pressure, compressing discount rates and expanding P/E multiples over the next week.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 5-day returns in more than 50% of co-occurring low-unemployment/low-rate instances, or the interaction effect disappears when controlling for VIX levels.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained weakness in housing permits signals collapsing consumer confidence and future consumption slowdown, triggering equity de-rating over the subsequent month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 600.0 for two consecutive months
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward returns remain positive in over 60% of triggered instances, or the signal's hit rate fails to exceed 55% across multiple market cycles.
